title: Language family historical spread (illustrative)
description: Irregular shapes approximating attested and reconstructed macro-distributions — not political, census, or genetic boundaries. Regenerate with tools/generate-extent-geojson.py

properties.name: Sino-Tibetan (Sinitic, Tibetic, and peripheral SE Asian)
Afroasiatic (Maghreb, Horn, Levant, Mesopotamia, Arabia, Upper Nile)
Dravidian (South India, northern Sri Lanka, diaspora nodes)
Turkic (Anatolia through Steppe, Inner Asia, pockets in Siberia)
Uto-Aztecan (Nahuan, Tepiman, and Northern/Sonoran subgroups, illustrative range)
Na-Dene (Northern + Pacific + Apachean, disjunct illustrative blurs)
Algic (Algonquian–Wiyôt–Yurok, Plains to Subarctic to NE)
